notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers pops out to second baseman Marcus Semien on the infield fly rule.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien singles on a line drive to right fielder Spencer Steer. Marcus Semien to 2nd. Marcus Semien advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Spencer Steer.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Brett Baty plunked
notableEvents.detail: Brett Baty hit by pitch. A.J. Ewing to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jared Young GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jared Young grounds into a double play, second baseman Edwin Arroyo to shortstop Matt McLain to first baseman Sal Stewart. Bo Bichette out at 2nd. Jared Young out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mark Vientos pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos homers (8) on a fly ball to left field. Marcus Semien scores.

notableEvents.label: Eric Wagaman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eric Wagaman singles on a ground ball to center fielder Blake Dunn.
